game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Pizza Tower is a fast paced 2D platformer, with an emphasis on movement, exploration and score attack. Featuring highly stylized pixel art inspired by the cartoons from the '90s, and a highly energetic soundtrack.
Pizza Tower is a fast paced 2D platformer, with an emphasis on movement, exploration and score attack. Featuring highly stylized pixel art inspired by the cartoons from the '90s, and a highly energetic soundtrack.

Peppino Spaghetti, a surprisingly agile and powerful fat balding italian, is on a mission to destroy the titular Pizza Tower in order to save his restaurant from annihilation. Follow him through his rampage across the many wacky floors of the tower, collecting toppings and beating up monsters!

PLAY as Peppino Spaghetti, the supersonic italian middle-aged man! And sometimes Gustavo.

EXPLORE up to 5 floors leading to many levels, discover all of their secrets!

FIGHT some monsters and other weirdos!

DESTROY everything in your path, including those stupid rats.

BECOME the Pizza Tower!

  • Weird crazy characters and animations!
  • An insanely energetic soundtrack!
  • An unusual platformer formula!
  • Play like you want! Go for the highest score or explore at your own pace!
game_info.description: You are Peppino, a fast and agile pizza chef on a mission to reach the top of the Pizza Tower! Sprint, jump, and dash through a vertical platforming level filled with pizza collectibles and obstacles. Collect as many pizzas as possible while racing against time. Reach the exit at the top to win, but watch out - falling off the bottom means game over!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move left and right
Arrow Up: Jump
Space: Dash forward (breaks through obstacles, adds speed boost)
Z: Ground pound (when airborne, destroys blocks below)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement mechanics and collision detection. Verifying that the player can move left, right, jump, and interact with platforms correctly without falling through or getting stuck.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player left and right across platforms, perform jumps of varying heights, and test collision with different platform types. Ensure smooth movement and proper physics response.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates platforms, jumps work correctly, collisions are detected properly, and no clipping occurs. The test is successful when all basic movement actions work as intended without errors.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully navigates platforms, jumps work correctly, collisions are detected properly, and no clipping occurs. The test is successful when all basic movement actions work as intended without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the optimal path to win the game by collecting pizzas and reaching the exit. This validates the win condition and tests the player's ability to complete the level efficiently.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate upward through the tower using jumps and dashes strategically. Collect pizzas along the way for score. Use dash to break through destructible blocks. Reach the exit platform at the top of the tower.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully reach the exit at the top of the tower, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test is successful when the win condition is achieved within a reasonable time frame with good score.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing special abilities - dash and ground pound mechanics. Verifying that these abilities work correctly and interact properly with the environment and destructible objects.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Use dash ability to break through destructible blocks and gain speed boosts. Use ground pound while airborne to destroy blocks below. Test combinations of abilities with movement.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Dash successfully breaks destructible blocks and provides momentum. Ground pound destroys blocks below when executed in air. Abilities enhance gameplay without causing glitches. Test succeeds when all special moves function correctly.
TEST_3.description: Testing special abilities - dash and ground pound mechanics. Verifying that these abilities work correctly and interact properly with the environment and destructible objects.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing edge cases and failure conditions. Validating that falling off the bottom of the screen triggers game over, and testing boundary conditions.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Deliberately move toward the bottom edge of playable area. Test what happens when player falls below the lowest platform. Verify game over triggers correctly.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Falling below the play area triggers GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Game handles edge cases gracefully without crashes. Test successful when lose condition works as designed.
